Data Processing Addendum (Vietnam) between Nam Kiem Digital Manufacturing JSC (issuer) and VietSun Commerce Bank (processor) for payroll, investor relations, and compliance logs.
Legal basis: Decree 13/2023/ND-CP on personal data protection and the Law on Securities; MNPI means issuer/securities information not yet public and likely to materially affect price.
Scope: Process only role-level identifiers and business contacts; generic form labels appear in systems: [Employee Name], [CCCD], [Passport], [Phone], [Email], [MST], [Account No.].
One local identifier retained for compliance: MST 0438295710 (company tax code; checksum intentionally invalid for template purposes).
Examples that are not relied upon as PII: CCCD 012345678901 (sample only), Passport VN-P1234567 (sample), Account 9704 0000 0000 0000 (masked), IR hotline 1800 000 111 (public helpline).
MNPI handling: Insider lists use role titles (e.g., CFO, Listing Advisor) without personal names; draft offering references are already disclosed on the Saigon Main Board via CBTT dated 12/02/2025.
Disclosures: Public announcements are posted on the VietCapital Exchange portal and do not constitute MNPI; private drafts are restricted and excluded from this DPA’s processing until published.
Purposes: Payroll, taxation reporting, and investor inquiry triage; bank transactions recorded as business metadata only and exclude personal addresses.
Retention: Employee payroll records kept 5 years post termination; investor inquiry logs kept 24 months; MNPI-related flags auto-deleted within 30 days after public disclosure.
Transfers: Backup storage may be hosted in ASEAN cloud regions by Tam Son Data Services Ltd. under controller instructions; no onward transfers without written approval.
Data subject rights: Submit DSAR via Form DSAR-01 at privacy@namkiem.vn (department mailbox) or via public helpline 1900 888 000; do not send passports or CCCD images to these channels.
Security: Encryption at rest, role-based access, and audit trails; employee directories display only job titles and unit codes, not phone numbers.
Access control: Processor will not query trading account balances; any bank identifiers displayed are placeholders and invalid for execution.
Contacts: Compliance Officer (role) via privacy@namkiem.vn; investor queries through the public helpline noted above; no personal lines are provided.
